name: couchbase
description: Official Couchbase plugin (MCP Server + Skills) for Codex. Connect to a live Couchbase cluster, explore data, run SQL++, optimize queries/indexes, and design data models via the Couchbase MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Couchbase MCP + skills: query, optimize, and model a live cluster.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Couchbase connection using the couchbase-mcp-setup skill.
Connect to my Couchbase cluster and explore its buckets, scopes, and collections.
Write a SQL++ query to analyze the documents in my collection.
Optimize the slow SQL++ queries and indexes in my Couchbase cluster.
Design a Couchbase document data model for my use case.
